bands: re-anchored measured 2026-07-15 @ SpinRecoveryAssist default 7.0 (tested 6->7 on the hatch) — bands anchored to the assist-ON run with headroom so they FAIL if the assist stops firing (OFF baselines unchanged, assist-off=0 regardless of default: hatch 3.02 s / 9.38 m, coupe 1.64 s / 5.52 m). Prior 6.0-anchored bands were 2.2/6.0 (hatch) and 1.3/4.0 (coupe).
